label: cache proof • replaying the identical query is the guaranteed-hit shape
query: List the seven days of the week, comma-separated.
notes: No followUpTurns → the runner sends the query twice in one session, the strongest possible prefix overlap (system prompt + identical turn 1). If THIS shape doesn't produce a reuse hit, prefix caching is off or broken — the row is the cheapest possible smoke for the whole cache path. Topology mapping as elsewhere; requireCompanionOnHybrid default applies. Off-CI (needs a local model).
